challenger.text: The proposed digest feature assumes users actually want a batched summary, but we have zero evidence anyone asked for fewer interruptions versus richer per-event alerts.

advisor.text: From a go-to-market angle, three incumbents already bundle weekly rollups inside their pricing tiers, so differentiation must come from relevance ranking rather than mere batching.

critic.text: Implementation-wise the scheduler introduces a recurring fan-out job that contends with the existing notification queue; idempotency on retried digest windows is the trap.
